subject: fix(ui): address code review findings — ARIA IDs, scroll lock, icons, cleanup
body:
- ConfirmDialog: use React useId() for unique ARIA IDs per instance,
  preventing ID collisions when multiple dialogs render simultaneously
- Extract ref-counted scroll lock to src/lib/scrollLock.ts, shared by
  ConfirmDialog and BottomSheet — fixes body overflow race when both
  overlays are open
- Remove dead subtle-pop keyframe, add faster animate-dialog-in (0.15s)
  for immediate-feel confirmation dialogs
- Fix Unpublish icon from plus-sign to eye-with-slash (semantic clarity)
- Fix Publish icon from generic circle to globe (represents "go live")
- Refactor PageTabs IIFE into pre-computed variable + simple conditional

Tags: ui, accessibility, cleanup, bug-fix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
